languages.title: Mál
languages.subtitle: Vel málið, sum verður brúkt í allari appini.
languages.noResults: Einki mál samsvarar við tína leiting.

phone.label: Telefonnummar
phone.searchCountry: Leita eftir landi, kóða ella ringiforstavi
phone.noCountries: Einki land samsvarar við tína leiting.
phone.invalid: Skriva inn eitt galdandi telefonnummar fyri valda landið.

auth.onboardingTagline: Ein persónligur trygdarfelagi fyri løturnar millum "Eg havi tað gott" og "Eg havi brúk fyri hjálp."
auth.createSubtitle: Vel eina innskráningarmáta fyri at verja tína trygdargraf.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Vit kundu ikki fullføra innritanina. Kanna sambandið og royn aftur.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Við at brúka eina staðbundna menningarfund. Native Google Sign-In virkar í eini menningarútgávu.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Par nú ella hald fram og legg tað afturat seinni.
auth.northStarBody: VL01 burðartólið kann seta trygdarflæði í gongd við trýstum og langum trýstirørslum.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Tín blíða trygdarfelagi á kortinum og í útkallum.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear kann hjálpa við heima-ham, guardian-ham, neyðstøðu, undanførslu-uppringingum og røddarstuðli.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Brúkt til kortið, vandasvæði, trygga komu og SOS samanhang.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving biður um staðseting, so verjar kunnu skilja, hvar hjálp kann vera neyðug. Tú kanst broyta hetta seinni í Stillingum.
permissions.notificationsBody: Vit brúka bert fráboðanir til trygdarboð, neyðuppdateringar og áminningar, sum tú kanst virkja.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving brúkar staðsetingina tína til trygdarkort, vandasvæði, skjótdeiling og SOS samanhang. Tú kanst broyta hetta seinni í Stillingum.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sendir áminningar um innritan, neyðarboð og trygdarboð, sum tú kanst virkja. Vit brúka ikki fráboðanir til lýsingar.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving brúkar mikrofonina bara, tá tú byrjar eina AI companion ella trygdarkall.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving brúkar Bluetooth til at para NorthStar smykkur, lesa sambandsstøðu og seta trygdarflæði frá klæðunum í gongd.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving heldur hendan flóðið tøkt frá Stillingum og dashboardinum.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Vel tann fylgisrødd, sum kennist tryggast at hoyra.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Fimm trýst kunnu føra til SOS og verju ávaringar.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Skapa eina virðiliga orsøk at fara úr eini óbehagiligari støðu.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Byrja eina samrøðu við fylgjaran í rauntíð, tá tú hevur tørv á stuðli.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Halt smykkini nær við meðan tú skanna.
jewelry.noDevices: Einki NorthStar tól funnin í nærhendis enn.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth skanning kundi ikki byrja. Vinarliga royn aftur.
jewelry.scanFailed: Vit kundu ikki finna smykkir nærhendis. Kanna Bluetooth, halt NorthStar nær, og royn aftur.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth skanning kundi ikki byrja. Kanna Bluetooth atgongd og royn aftur.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Atgongd til nærliggjandi tól er sløkt. Lat Bluetooth atgongd í Stillingum, og royn so aftur.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar tók ov langa tíð at fáa samband. Flyt tað nærri og royn aftur.
jewelry.connectFailed: Vit kundu ikki fáa samband við NorthStar. Kanna at tað er løtt og nærhendis, og royn so aftur.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Halt NorthStar lødda og tætt at telefonini, og skanna so aftur.

home.subtitle: Trygdarfelaga instrumentpanelið
home.readyBody: Rødd, kort, smykkur og verjar eru bert eitt trýst burtur.

map.title: Trygdarkort
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go forsmakk; Mapbox renderar í eini menningarútgávu.
map.updateFailed: Vit kundu ikki dagføra staðsetingina hjá tær. Vinarliga royn aftur.
map.notRequested: Atgongd til staðseting varð ikki biðin um. Tú kanst virkja tað seinni frá Stillingum.
map.permissionOff: Atgongdin til staðsetingina er sløkt. Virkja tað í Stillingum fyri at miðsavna trygdarkortið um teg.
map.timeout: Tín staðseting tekur longri tíð enn væntað. Flyt teg til eitt stað við greiðari signal og royn aftur.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Álítandi staðir, tú goymir, síggjast her fyri skjóta atgongd.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: At knýta seg trygt til tín røddarfelaga...

messagesWaiting.one: %{count} boð, sum bíðar eftir at verða send
messagesWaiting.other: %{count} boð, sum bíða eftir at verða send

safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Týpa um at tosa er torført
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Byrja samtaluna ella skriva eina boð, tá tú ert klárur.

history.clearMessage: Hetta tekur burtur goymdar AI fylgisveinaboð frá hesum tólinum.
history.title: Samtalusøga
history.subtitle: AI fylgjaraboð goymd á hesum tólinum.
history.emptyMessage: Tínar AI fylgisveinasamrøður koma fram her eftir fyrsta samtalið.
history.loadFailed: Vit kundu ikki lata samtalusøguna inn. Vinarliga royn aftur.
history.clearFailed: Vit kundu ikki rudda samrøðusøguna. Vinarliga royn aftur.
history.deleteFailed: Vit kundu ikki strika ta samrøðuna. Vinarliga royn aftur.

voices.title: Míni trygdarkall ljóða
voices.subtitle: Vel tann fylgisrødd, sum følist rætt at hoyra.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Vinarliga royn at velja røddina aftur.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Hetta røddardømi kundi ikki spælast. Vinarliga royn aftur.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Brúka pakkaðar fylgisvar, tá netverkið ella Hume ikki eru tøkar.
settings.privacyBody: Eksportera ella strika lokal dátur, sum eru goymdar á hesum tólinum.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Eg kann ikki flyta út tínar dátur nú.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Hetta tekur burtur tín profil, innstillingar, neyðarkontaktir, samrøðusøgu, loyvisáminningar og lokal auth-sessión frá hesum tólinum.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Eg kann ikki strika lokal data í løtuni.
settings.linkFailed: Ber ikki til at opna leinkjuna
settings.updateFailedMessage: Vit kundu ikki bjarga hesum ynski. Vinarliga royn aftur.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Tín session er framvegis virkin. Vinarliga royn aftur.

contacts.title: Neyðarkontaktir
contacts.subtitle: Álítandi fólk tøk undir trygdargongdum.
contacts.name: Navn
contacts.emptyMessage: Legg onkran afturat, tú hevur álit á, so tey eru klár, tá trygdarflóðið hevur tørv á teimum.
contacts.removeMessage: Hesin persónur fer ikki longur at síggjast í tínum neyðartilfari.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Vit kundu ikki bjarga hesum sambandi. Kanna smálutirnar og royn aftur.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Vit kundu ikki taka hesa kontaktina burtur. Vinarliga royn aftur.

friends.title: Vinir
friends.subtitle: Verjar, ynski og neyðgrafur.
friends.emptyMessage: Álítandi vinir og verjar koma fram her, tá teir verða lagdir afturat.

emergency.title: Bráðfeingis SOS
emergency.subtitle: Eskalera bert tá tú hevur brúk fyri skjótum stuðli.
emergency.body: Hetta boðar frá trygdargongdini hjá tær og fyrireikar neyðkontaktir.
emergency.addContact: Legg ein neyðarkontakt til í Stillingum.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Staðsetingardeilingarstubbin er klárur. Knýt backend share-endapunktið til at senda livandi leinkjur.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Tvítrýst á NorthStar fyri at sleppa einari trygdarappelsin.
capybearTap.body: Gestture route er klár til BLE event wiring.

errors.voiceOffline: Tú sær út til at vera offline. Tín boðskapur verður sendur, tá tú knýtir samband aftur.
errors.voiceQueued: Boðskapurin er goymdur. Tað verður sent, tá røddarfylgisveinurin knýtir seg aftur.
errors.voiceConnecting: At knýta seg trygt til tín røddarfelaga...
errors.microphone: Mikrofonatgongd er neyðug til røddarsamtøl. Tú kanst virkja tað í Stillingum, ella skriva eina boð í staðin.
errors.billing: Online røddarfylgisveinurin er brádliga ikki tøkur. Tú kanst halda fram við offline companion.
errors.authentication: Røddarvinurin kundi ikki vátta hesa sessiónina. Rita inn aftur ella brúka offline fylgisveinin fyri nú.
errors.timeout: Røddarvinurin tók ov langa tíð at svara. Kanna sambandið og royn aftur.
errors.network: Vit kundu ikki fáa samband við røddarfelagan. Kanna sambandið, royn so aftur ella halda fram offline.
errors.genericVoice: Okkurt avbrot røddina. Rokna aftur, ella halda fram við offline companion.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving hevur brúk fyri mikrofonatgongd fyri trygd og AI samrøður við fylgisveinar.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving brúkar staðsetingina hjá tær til trygdarkortið og nærliggjandi trygdarfunktiónir.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving brúkar Bluetooth til at knýta seg til tínar NorthStar trygdarsmykkur.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Hesin innritimøguleiki er ikki tøkur í hesari útgávuni.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Halt fram sum demo (bert til menning)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demostøða brúkar bert lokal royndardátur. Sambundnar tænastur eru ikki samleikaváttaðar, og henda setan verður nullstillað, tá ið appin verður endurlisin.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Váttanarkotan er skeiv ella farin úr gildi. Bið um eina nýggja kotu og royn aftur.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Ov nógvar innritingarroyndir. Bíða eina løtu og royn aftur.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Váttan av innriting tók ov langa tíð. Kanna sambandið og royn aftur.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Vit fingu ikki samband við innritingartænastuna. Kanna sambandið og royn aftur.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Setan tín er farin úr gildi. Rita inn aftur.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Trygdarkortið kundi ikki lesast. Kanna sambandið og royn aftur.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Beinleiðis staðseting er ikki tøk. Vísir tína seinast goymdu staðseting frá %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Vit kundu ikki deila staðseting tína. Kanna atgongd til staðseting og royn aftur.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Her er mín seinast goymda staðseting, skrásett %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Atgongd til Bluetooth er sløkt. Kveik hana í Stillingum og royn aftur.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth er sløkt. Kveik tað og royn aftur.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Bluetooth-pøring er ikki tøk á hesi eindini ella í hesari útgávuni.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Vit funnu ikki NorthStar. Hav tað nærhendis, kanna Bluetooth og royn aftur.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Eingar NorthStar-eindir vóru funnar nærhendis. Hav tað nærhendis og leita aftur.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Vit fingu ikki samband við NorthStar. Hav tað løtt og nærhendis og royn aftur.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Vit kundu ikki goyma hetta staðið. Royn aftur.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Telefonveljarin varð latin upp; uppkallið er ikki váttað.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Eingin neyðkontakt var tøk; einki uppkall varð gjørt.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Telefonveljarin kundi ikki latast upp; einki uppkall varð gjørt.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Raddarfylgisveinurin er ikki tøkur í løtuni. Royn aftur seinni ella halt fram við fylgisveininum uttan net.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
